subject: NEW: Tango classifier for filtering FB matches
body:
Booker,

Built a tango classifier to filter out non-tango FB matches.

## LOCATION

```
harvester/lib/tango-classifier.ts
```

## USAGE

```typescript
import { classifyTango } from '../harvester/lib/tango-classifier.ts';

const result = classifyTango(fbEventTitle, fbEventDescription);
if (result.isTango) {
  // Accept this FB match
} else {
  // Skip - not a tango event
}
```

## RETURNS

```typescript
{
  isTango: boolean,      // true = accept, false = reject
  confidence: number,    // 0-1 score
  reason: string,        // human-readable explanation
  matchedKeywords: [],   // tango keywords found
  redFlags: []           // non-tango indicators found
}
```

## TEST RESULTS

✗ NOT TANGO (0%): "The Oaklash Festival 2026"
✓ TANGO (70%): "CELLSpace Revival Alternative Milonga"
✓ TANGO (100%): "Berkeley Tango Practica"
✗ NOT TANGO (0%): "Jazz in the Park"
✓ TANGO (50%): "Tango Under the Stars"
✗ NOT TANGO (0%): "Salsa Night"

## CLI TEST

```bash
cd harvester
node --experimental-strip-types lib/tango-classifier.ts "Event Title" "Description"
```

— Harvey
